_comment: Pele figma-extras hooks. Only meaningful when you use the Figma MCP plugin (mcp.figma.com). Merged into ~/.claude/settings.json by `install.sh --figma`.

PreToolUse._comment: When Claude calls get_design_context on a Figma node, prompt it to clarify ambiguous parts of the static design before generating code. Static designs miss loading/empty/error states, interactions, and animation details — those must come from the user.

hooks.command:
printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Static Figma designs miss key information that must be clarified before implementation. Use AskUserQuestion to clarify (platform conventions, code style, directory structure are documented in AGENTS.md — no need to ask):

1) Where to land: new screen or modify an existing one? Which app / module?
2) Non-static behavior: loading / empty / error states, interactions and animations (not visible in a static design)
3) Specific details that look ambiguous or unclear in the design

If the above is already clarified this round, continue. Otherwise, ask first before implementing."}}'
